source_text: 18. Correspondence Package Assembly. The basic letter, the enclosures, and the background material are assembled according to activity practices before they are presented for approval and signature. Figure 7-9 illustrates an assembled correspondence package that is ready for signature and mailing.
plain_language_rule: Assemble the basic letter, enclosures, and background material according to activity practices before presenting the package for approval and signature. Figure 7-9 shows a suggested way to assemble a correspondence package for signature and mailing. Suggested package elements include the basic letter, enclosures, background material, and official file copy. Figure 7-9 shows tabbing or marking items as needed for review/signature. Figure 7-9 supports physical-package assembly guidance, not digital rendering.
notes: Figure 7-9 is rule-bearing but advisory. The section defers actual assembly to activity practices. Do not convert the suggested assembly order into a hard validator requirement. No renderer behavior is implied.
